content: Dexie.js v4.4.4 (June 2026) is clearly the winner for relational many-to-many data in IndexedDB. Advantages: ORM-like API with typed EntityTable generics, compound indexes, chainable queries, automatic transaction management, schema versioning with upgrade() callbacks, and dexie-react-hooks (useLiveQuery) for reactive React rendering. Works across tabs and service workers. idb is a minimal promise wrapper with better DX than raw IndexedDB but lacks query API, compound indexes, and requires manual cursor iteration for relational data — only wins on bundle size. Raw IndexedDB is too verbose. For a relational model like WordForm ↔ Meaning many-to-many, Dexie is the right choice.
